NOTE: This is an AI-generated test document, it's not real, and any resemblance to real people or places is coincidence.

Jordan,

Reviewed the scope doc you sent over — looks good overall. A few notes from our CTO,
Wendy Zhao, after she read through the API section:

1. We'd like the auth flow to use magic links instead of passwords for V1, since our
   target users (freelance photographers) hate remembering passwords.
2. Wendy wants the backend on Postgres rather than Mongo, mostly for reporting later.
3. Can we push the "team accounts" feature to V2? We want to launch single-user first
   and validate before building multi-user.

Assuming those are fine, I'll get the contract signed by Friday. We're targeting a
closed beta launch by June 1st for about 50 photographers we've already got on a
waitlist.

Also — my co-founder Aisha Bello will be your main point of contact for design
feedback going forward, I'm heads-down on fundraising for the next few weeks.

Talk soon,
Nate Bishop
Founder, TechStart Ventures
